Reports and Policy Submissions

Below is a list of reports, consultation responses and other publications developed by the Society on the mathematical sciences research landscape and academic community. Where possible, we have included the raw data used to inform each publication.

Documents on best practice relating to EDI, as developed by the LMS Committee for Women and Diversity in Mathematics, can be found here. A separate archive of Society responses to Government and other consultations can be found here.

If you have questions or suggestions, please contact Katherine Wright, Communications and Policy Manager (katherine.wright@lms.ac.uk).

2026 | 2024 | 2023 | 2022 | 2020 | 2019 | 2018 | 2017 | 2016 | 2015 | 2014 | 2013 | 2012 | 2011 | 2010 | 2009 | 2008 | 2007

Submission made by Consulting organisation/recipient Title/topic Date of submission

Read a summary of the consultation here.

LMS = London Mathematical Society

CMS = Council for the Mathematical Sciences
MPU = Mathematics Promotion Unit

Upcoming Events

LMS Gresham Lecture 2026 with Professor Colva Roney-Dougal OBE

Monday, 11 May, 2026
Location: Barnard's Inn Hall, Buchanan House, 24-30 Holborn, London, EC1N 2HS (UK) and online
Meeting details

LMS-IMA David Crighton Award Lecture and Medal Presentation 2026

Wednesday, 13 May, 2026
Location: The Royal Society, 6-9 Carlton House Terrace, London, SW1Y 5AG (UK)
Meeting details

LMS Education Day 2026 - Beyond Content: Engaging the Mathematical Sciences with an Evolving Skills Agenda

Tuesday, 19 May, 2026
Location: De Morgan House, London
Meeting details

Publications

  • 2025/26 Mathematika Prize for Excellent PhD Thesis

    We are excited to congratulate the winners of the 2025/26 Mathematika Prize for Excellent PhD Thesis: Alp Muyesser. Large-scale structures in groups. Supervised by Alexey Pokrovskiy…
    Read more

  • TNMOC and LMS International Conference: Turing's Legacy and the Future of Computing

    The National Museum of Computing (TNMOC), in partnership with the LMS, will be holding a landmark three-day international conference: Computable 90. Taking place from 16-18 September 2026 in the…
    Read more

  • 100 Years of the JLMS - articles published in a special collection

    The Journal of the London Mathematical Society was founded in 1926, its first issue being published in January of that year. To celebrate, the Society is publishing a special centenary issue…
    Read more

Conference Facilities

De Morgan House

Located in Russell Square, central London we offer excellent transport links, an affordable pricing structure and contemporary facilities housed in a Grade II listed building.

Conference Facilities Website
